pages.raw_text:
Is the Rockefeller system behind
the Graves road? The plan seems to
be, says a man on the inside, for the
O. r. & N. to work IN harmony with
the Graves people. The electric fran
chise also carries the right to haul
freight from the Occur d'Alene re-
gion to the boundary of Spokane, No
route would be better for link In a
transcontinental road. The Graves
line is now surveying toward Wallace.
The large interests Of Rockefeller in
the lead mines makes 1t probable. It
is said. that the carrying business
will be also controlled. The maxim
of the Rockefeller crowd is never
allow anyone else to make a profit"
The new road would be a great help
to Spokane. 1t is also recalled that
all supplies for the Graves road came
over the o. r. & N.
